execution_history.reason: Portfolio finalized; iterative testing shows substantial beta reduction (now ~0.60), Sharpe and Sortino maximized (Sharpe 2.33), max drawdown improved, and intra-portfolio correlations and sector risks diversified with non-overlapping tickers. No further changes yield significant performance improvement.
